app.title: Developer Tools
app.description: A collection of useful developer tools that run entirely in your browser. Your data never leaves your device.

base64.title: Base64 Decoder
base64.description: Decode Base64 encoded strings quickly and easily in your browser.

base64-encode.title: Base64 Encoder
base64-encode.description: Encode strings to Base64 format quickly and easily in your browser.

jwt.title: JWT Decoder / Encoder
jwt.description: Decode, inspect, and encode JSON Web Tokens (JWT) to view their header, payload, and signature.

color.title: Color Converter
color.description: Convert colors between different formats (HEX, RGB, HSL, etc.) with a live preview.

color-compare.title: Color Compare
color-compare.description: Compare two colors side by side with live swatches and normalized output.

hmac.title: HMAC Generator
hmac.description: Generate a Hash-based Message Authentication Code (HMAC) to verify message integrity and authenticity using your secret key.

secrets.title: Secret Generator
secrets.description: Generate cryptographically secure secrets and passwords with configurable length and special characters.
secrets.errorNoCharset: Please select at least one character set.

diff.title: Text Diff
diff.description: Compare two texts and see their differences highlighted, with support for character, word, and line-based diffing.

word-counter.title: Word Counter
word-counter.description: Count characters, words, sentences, and paragraphs in your text with real-time statistics.
word-counter.placeholder: Type or paste your text here to count words, characters, and more...

sql-formatter.title: SQL Formatter
sql-formatter.description: Format and beautify SQL queries with syntax highlighting.

json-formatter.title: JSON Formatter
json-formatter.description: Format and prettify your JSON data instantly in your browser.

qr-code.title: QR Code Generator
qr-code.description: Generate QR codes from text, URLs, or any data directly in your browser.

notification-tester.title: Notification Tester
notification-tester.description: Test browser notifications with permission handling and delayed notifications.

secret-sharing.title: Secret Sharing
secret-sharing.description: Encrypt a secret with a password and share it via a URL. Decrypts in the browser.

dns-records.title: DNS Records
dns-records.description: Look up DNS records for any domain using Google's public DNS service.

timezone-converter.title: Timezone Converter
timezone-converter.description: Convert times between different timezones. Supports timestamps, ISO dates, and custom formats.

india-income-tax.title: Income Tax Calculator
india-income-tax.description: Calculate income tax for India's new tax regime (FY 2025-26) with detailed breakdown by slab, cess, and surcharge.

bounty-calculator.title: Bounty Calculator
bounty-calculator.description: Suggest a bug bounty payout from a CVSS vector string using tier-based interpolation and component kickers.

cvss-calculator.title: CVSS Calculator
cvss-calculator.description: Build a CVSS v3.1 vector by picking each metric, see the live base score and severity, and copy or share the result.
